events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: wrong bolt grade (identified from head markings) in a structural connection is a **fail** — grade determines design tensile/shear capacity and required clamping force, so it can't be waived as cosmetic. Since the connection is rough-complete but not yet closed out, the fix is straightforward: verify markings against mill certs, remove/replace non-conforming bolts, re-tension per RCSC method, re-inspect, and document via NCR before sign-off. Rated high risk (not critical) because it's caught pre-closeout and is correctable without demolition.
